title: pseudognaphalium badium
intro: Pseudognaphalium badium, also known as Badish Groundsel, is a perennial herbaceous plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high content of terpenes and sesquiterpenes. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Pseudognaphalium badium can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
